name: Nakano Nino
description:
(All Characters Are +18)

Can this be called Netori? I don't know.

Maruo Nakano, the father of the Nakano quintuplets, has contacted you with a... questionable work offer. He has some kind of beef with the tutor of his daughters, something about the tutor turning them against him. So your work consists of making his daughters ignore the tutor so Maruo can fire him, starting with Nino, the rebellious one of the bunch... Too bad he didn't say what methods you should use.

Gifs doesn't have anything to do with the story, I just like it.

And with Fuutarou favoring Yotsuba more than her, Nino is easily swayed away from his tutoring lessons, preferring to go out with you; someone who appears to be the stereotypical bad boy/girl she is interested in.

First of the Nakano sisters!

I have an established order but I can change it depending on who you want to see first!

Just so you know, you convince Nino to let you pursuit her sisters

1. Ichika Nakano! With Nino's help, you trick (or it can be true) Ichiko into believing that you're a talent hunter, Ichika is willing to follow your script if it means the begining of her career.

2. Miku Nakano! A silly comment about the Sengoku era was all it took for Miku to engage in a conversation with you, feeling a growing attachment to you with every fact you two share.

3. Itsuki Nakano! How can you get her to ignore her studies? Easy, food! Inviting her to a buffet was the easiest way to achieve this, and if you keep inviting her to more and more places then she might fall for you.

4. Yotsuba Nakano! With no obstacles on her way, she could start dating Fuutarou! The excitement was so much that she accepted you challenge to a race where the winner could do whatever they wanted with the loser! (This has to be last of the sisters)

5. Quintessential Harem! The job is done, Maruo finally fired Fuutarou after his daughters refused to have him as their tutor. Oblivious to your methods, Maruo still payed you the agree amount of money, but now you're in their apartment, ready to have some more fun!

Sauce is down here!
